children.label: Vouch banner: 'Anand invited you to Janata' (inviter avatar+name)
One strong hero: 3D art + one-line what-Janata-is (extra slides OPTIONAL/swipeable, not forced)
Accept invite (primary) + Already a member? Log in (ghost)
Create account: email + password, invite pre-applied, verified at inception
Invalid/expired state -> paste a link / request one
Auto-logged-in -> one-tap 'Join?' or open app (NO signup)
Real events + centers near you, immediately; location pill refiner (fallback 'Popular this week' if location unknown)
Tap event -> event detail -> RSVP -> name+email only (account-less; #191 guest RSVP backing)
Tries member account -> invite wall: 'members need an invite' + RSVP + ask a member
Log in (existing member) -> in-context login -> resume pending action

rule: Auth never blocks the door. It fires only at the commit moment (Accept / RSVP / Log in), and the user only ever sees the variant that fits their state.
kept_from_current: form-01 email->checkUserExists routing (reused for Condition 3 login)
cut: blk-02 generic 3-bullet benefit list on initial auth step (replaced by door-specific heroes)
PUBLIC-EXPLORE silent-account browse hack (AuthPromptModal; #440 deletes it)

net_new_this_round: Door 2 browse-first landing screen (#404 owns build)
reality_check.still_a_todo: hard-gate enforcement (retire PUBLIC-EXPLORE + grandfather migration) deferred in #440 — account-less RSVP and invite-only accounts coexist until it lands

rationale: Wins every top task: vouch felt at 0 taps, events at 0 taps, RSVP without account, existing-member login from the browse door, auto-logged-in skips signup. Lines up with #440's direction; fills the two screens #440 left to #403/#404; makes Door 1 leaner than the mock's forced carousel.

approved.note: Yes — build Door 1 + Door 2 on this flow (after confirming it matches v2/#440)
